title: Uromyrtus ngoyensis
taxonomy: Uromyrtus ngoyensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Mozambique. The classification of Uromyrtus ngoyensis is as follows: it belongs to the genus Uromyrtus, and its full taxonomic classification is Uromyrtus ngoyensis, which is further classified under the kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Myrtales, family Myrtaceae, genus Uromyrtus, and species U. ngoyensis. Uromyrtus ngoyensis is a species within the genus Uromyrtus. The Myrtaceae family is a large and diverse family of flowering plants.
uses: Uromyrtus ngoyensis is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. However, specific information about its medicinal uses is limited.
